title: Vagrant Box
description: A Vagrant box is a package format for Vagrant environments that includes the base image and metadata for one or more virtualization providers. Boxes are the fundamental unit of distribution in the Vagrant ecosystem.

tag.description: The full tag of the box in username/name format.

username.description: The username or organization that owns the box.

name.description: The name of the box, unique within the owner namespace.

private.description: Whether the box is private and requires authentication to access.

downloads.description: The total number of downloads for this box across all versions.

short_description.description: A brief description of the box for display in search results and listings.

description.description: The full description of the box in Markdown format.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the box was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the box was last updated.

versions.description: List of versions available for this box.

current_version.description: The current released version of this box.

Version.description: A version of a Vagrant box following semantic versioning. Versions must be released before they are available for download by users.

version.description: The version number following semantic versioning.

status.description: The release status of the version.

description.description: The description of this version in Markdown format.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the version was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the version was last updated.

downloads.description: The total number of downloads for this version.

providers.description: List of providers available for this version.

Provider.description: A provider represents a specific virtualization platform for which a box file is available, such as VirtualBox, VMware, or Docker.

name.description: The name of the provider such as virtualbox, vmware_desktop, docker, or hyperv.

hosted.description: Whether the box file is hosted on Vagrant Cloud.

url.description: The URL of the box file if externally hosted.

download_url.description: The URL to download the box file.

checksum_type.description: The type of checksum used for the box file.

checksum.description: The checksum value for verifying the integrity of the box file.

architecture.description: The CPU architecture the box supports.

default_architecture.description: Whether this is the default architecture for the provider.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the provider was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the provider was last updated.
